---
title: "compile_failure_report.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/compile_failure_report.py"
loc: 38
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.72
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 5.61
overall_score: 3.76
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating FailureReporter, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import FailureReporter and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `FailureReporter`
- `execute`
